title: Aureline in-progress-history-operation state vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the in-progress-history-operation record family frozen in docs/vcs/git_state_and_worktree_contract.md. One history_operation_state_record pins which in-progress operation a surface is operating on (history_operation_kind_class drawn from the closed nine-value vocabulary covering merge, rebase interactive / noninteractive, cherry-pick, revert, mailbox-apply, bisect, and apply-imported-patch; history_operation_state_class drawn from the closed six-value vocabulary covering not_applicable_clean, paused_pending_conflict_resolution, paused_pending_user_continuation, running_no_user_action_required, completed_recovery_object_minted, and aborted_rolled_back_to_recovery_object; the target worktree id ref the operation owns; the optional target branch id ref; the recovery_object_ref required when the kind is anything other than no_operation_clean; the conflict_handoff_class re-exported from the change-stack contract; the in_progress_banner_class drawn from the closed six-value vocabulary; the review_sheet_class drawn from the closed five-value vocabulary; and the actor / command / approval-ticket attribution required for every state past not_applicable_clean). One audit stream (history_operation_state) carries the closed denial-reason and event-id vocabularies. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit / remote URLs, raw author identity strings, raw commit message bodies, raw patch bodies, and raw approval-ticket bodies MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema. The eventual git-service crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, history-operation-kind class, history-operation-state class, in-progress-banner class, review-sheet class, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps history_operation_state_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

history_operation_state_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the in-progress-history-operation vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary for support / audit; never carries the raw payload.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under.

conflict_handoff_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/vcs/change_object.schema.json. Pairs with merge_conflict_class_record_id_ref and history_edit_recovery_record_id_ref forward-dependency slots.

history_operation_kind_class.description: Frozen history-operation-kind vocabulary. no_operation_clean MUST pair with history_operation_state_class = not_applicable_clean, banner_no_banner_required_clean, review_sheet_no_sheet_required_clean, conflict_handoff_class = no_conflict_path_required, and a null recovery_object_ref. Every other kind MUST cite a non-null target_worktree_id_ref and a non-null recovery_object_ref.

history_operation_state_class.description: Frozen history-operation-state vocabulary. paused_pending_conflict_resolution MUST pair with conflict_handoff_class = conflict_resolution_packet_required_pending_decision; paused_pending_user_continuation MUST pair with one of conflict_resolution_packet_admitted_user_resolved, history_edit_recovery_packet_required_pending_decision, or history_edit_recovery_packet_admitted_user_resolved; aborted_rolled_back_to_recovery_object MUST cite a non-null recovery_object_ref (denies with history_operation_abort_recovery_object_required); completed_recovery_object_minted MUST cite a non-null recovery_object_ref.

in_progress_banner_class.description: Frozen in-progress-banner vocabulary. banner_no_banner_required_clean MUST pair with no_operation_clean; banner_bisect_next_step_required MUST pair with bisect_in_progress; banner_apply_imported_patch_continue_or_skip MUST pair with apply_or_am_imported_patch_in_progress.

review_sheet_class.description: Frozen review-sheet vocabulary. review_sheet_no_sheet_required_clean MUST pair with no_operation_clean; review_sheet_in_progress_operation_resume_or_abort and review_sheet_in_progress_operation_abort_to_recovery_object_only MUST pair with a paused or aborted state.

history_operation_state_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the history_operation_state audit stream.

history_operation_state_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the history_operation_state stream. history_operation_state_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a history_operation_state_denial_reason.

workspace_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the workspace row in schemas/workspace/* the operation is bound to.

target_worktree_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the worktree_row_record the operation owns. Required (non-null) when history_operation_kind_class is anything other than no_operation_clean; null on no_operation_clean rows.

target_branch_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the branch_row_record the operation runs on. Null when history_operation_kind_class is bisect_in_progress on a detached head, or when the kind is no_operation_clean.

recovery_object_ref.description: Opaque ref to the pre-mutation recovery object. Required (non-null) when history_operation_kind_class is anything other than no_operation_clean; null on no_operation_clean rows. A row whose state is aborted_rolled_back_to_recovery_object MUST cite the recovery object the abort rolled back to (denies with history_operation_abort_recovery_object_required).

actor_ref.description: Opaque ref to the acting identity. Required (non-null) when history_operation_kind_class is anything other than no_operation_clean; null otherwise.

command_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the command-dispatch id under which the operation was admitted. Required (non-null) when history_operation_kind_class is anything other than no_operation_clean.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref to the approval-ticket row admitting the operation. Required (non-null) when history_operation_kind_class is anything other than no_operation_clean and the state is past admission.

completed_at.description: Required (non-null) when history_operation_state_class is completed_recovery_object_minted. Null otherwise.

aborted_at.description: Required (non-null) when history_operation_state_class is aborted_rolled_back_to_recovery_object. Null otherwise.

merge_conflict_class_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the merge / conflict-class contract. Currently always null.

history_edit_recovery_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the dedicated history-edit recovery contract. Currently always null.

allOf.description: no_operation_clean MUST pair with not_applicable_clean state, banner_no_banner_required_clean banner, review_sheet_no_sheet_required_clean review sheet, no_conflict_path_required conflict handoff, and null target_worktree_id_ref / recovery_object_ref / actor_ref / command_id_ref / approval_ticket_ref / completed_at / aborted_at.

Every kind other than no_operation_clean MUST cite a non-null target_worktree_id_ref, recovery_object_ref, actor_ref, command_id_ref, and approval_ticket_ref so the in-progress operation is mechanically attributable.

paused_pending_conflict_resolution MUST pair with conflict_resolution_packet_required_pending_decision conflict handoff and banner_in_progress_operation_resume_or_abort banner and review_sheet_in_progress_operation_resume_or_abort review sheet.

paused_pending_user_continuation MUST pair with one of conflict_resolution_packet_admitted_user_resolved, history_edit_recovery_packet_required_pending_decision, or history_edit_recovery_packet_admitted_user_resolved conflict handoff.
completed_recovery_object_minted MUST cite a non-null completed_at and null aborted_at.
aborted_rolled_back_to_recovery_object MUST cite a non-null aborted_at and a non-null recovery_object_ref (denies with history_operation_abort_recovery_object_required) and null completed_at.
bisect_in_progress MUST pair with banner_bisect_next_step_required banner.

history_operation_state_record.description: Row shape consumed by the in-progress-operation banner, the source-control panel's status section, the branch-switch / worktree-removal review sheets, and the support / export bundle's git section. Exactly one row per in-progress operation identity.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is history_operation_state_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

history_operation_state_audit_event_reco.description: Audit-event row on the history_operation_state stream.
